June 3 2025 🥹
Hello Deewani Girls 🎀 @deewanixwriters
I am the type of reader "jisne apke almost sabhi books padhe hai" but vote nahi kiya tha na comment 🥲 uske bhi kuch reasons the. 11th mai maine Wattpad use karna shuru kiya tha tab mera Acc toh ban gaya tha and I could read books par vote and comment ka issue hogaya tha 😭 actually gmail support nahi karra tha mera ya idk kya problem tha. Toh maine halke mai le liya tha bus ki janedo story toh dikh jati hai phir 12th ke time par maine Wattpad chod diya tha kuch time ke liye, 1st year ke ending mai maine wapis start Kiya sahi se RESOLVING THE PROBLEM JUST BECAUSE MUJHE VOTE AND COMMENT KARNA THA APKE STORIES PAR 🥹🤌🏻Sabse pehle yeh story read karenge ab ham, kyuki it was the first one I read and BOHOT MAZA AYA THA 😭🦋💓 You people just put too much efforts in writing 💗 Your books made me feel every emotion ~ Happiness, sadness, feeling crazy and ohh those crazy banters 😂💓 Every single moment, I enjoyed reading these books a lot 🤍 and you guys are deserving of votes and comments. Baki ke log Joh re-read karrey hai ya first time read karrey hai toh sunlo ki aap log ka ek vote bhi matter karta hai. They do a lot of hardwork so itna toh ham kar hi sakte hai, ismai paise nahi lagte, JUST A CLICK AND BAS 👉🏻👈🏻 No harm in it. SO VOTE KARDIYA KARO PLEASE 🥺 I know bohot se log introvert hote hai (mai bhi hu but online mai theek thak extrovert hojati hu 😂) toh aap log comment nhi karenge jyada toh bhi theek hai, magar vote kardiya karo. I noticed ki hamesha vote ka target reh jata hai 🫠 
HAVE A GOOD DAY / NIGHT 🎀
